chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision App. No. S – 75 of 1992 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of matter For hearing of CMA No.165/2013 19-09-2022 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is an application filed by applicant No.1(b) for return of original documents, which have been referred to in the application, on the ground that the instant revision application has been disposed of; therefore, the same are no more required by this Court. It appears that the said documents were filed by the said applicant, and since the matter has already disposed of, there is no impediment in allowing this application. Hence, this application is allowed by directing the applicant to place on record photocopies of the same. Thereafter, office is directed to return the said original documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification as per rules. The listed application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
